data.body: HANDOFF CHECKPOINT (config-loop, 2026-06-17). The epic is substantively COMPLETE: all original config-file tasks (744e ADR, 252e typed Config, 43a0 loader/discovery, fe78 route+retire-inline-parsers, c647 rebar config, 83e6 back-compat, e211 perf, f81a docs) + the env-var story 60ce (EV-1..EV-4) are CLOSED. OSS best-practices validation (vs ruff/black/mypy/pytest/pip/uv/hatch/poetry/coverage/pydantic-settings + PEP 518/621/680) rated it ABOVE the OSS median; fail-closed verify gate confirmed correct. Two discovered follow-ups: cdd4 (wire CLI precedence layer via git -c style "rebar -c SECTION.KEY=VALUE") = CLOSED; 0ac6 (route reconciler.*/jira.*/llm.* config-FILE keys + ticket_clarity through the typed Config) = IN PROGRESS (slice 1/4 done: ticket_clarity). USER DECISION: implement 0ac6 fully, THEN close a621. So a621 should be closed by the agent that finishes 0ac6 — see the 0ac6 HANDOFF CHECKPOINT for the remaining slices (reconciler/jira/llm) + design guidance. State: main @ 2f8faa9d, store clean, full offline suite green (1995).
